text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
…Most of the coffee beans that make it into 
our cup are either arabica or robusta.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Robusta beans are bitter… and have a unique 
flavor. But when you blend them with arabica 
beans, they add a nice accent to the flavor…

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Every bean can shine given the right 
environment… Coffee teaches us kindness.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Would you like… to join me for a cup?
